payload.claim_text: storm season prep also includes a critically important operation at TBTA's two tunnels, with flood door testing at the Hugh L. Carey and Queens Midtown Tunnels. These doors were installed in 2017 as part of the Agency's long-term resiliency program.
payload.description: Flood doors installed in 2017 as part of long-term resiliency program, tested at Hugh L. Carey Tunnel and Queens Midtown Tunnel

evidence_refs.source_quote: storm season prep also includes a critically important operation at TBTA's two tunnels, with flood door testing at the Hugh L. Carey and Queens Midtown Tunnels. These doors were installed in 2017 as part of the Agency's long-term resiliency program.

payload.claim_text: the revised regulations would reduce the toll violation fee to $50 at the Bronx-Whitestone, JFK, Throgs Neck, and Verrazzano-Narrows Bridges, as well as the Queens Midtown and Hugh L. Carey Tunnels, and establish a $50 violation fee for the Congestion Relief Zone.
payload.description: Revised toll violation enforcement regulations: reduce fee to $50 at specified bridges and tunnels, establish $50 fee for Congestion Relief Zone

evidence_refs.source_quote: the revised regulations would reduce the toll violation fee to $50 at the Bronx-Whitestone, JFK, Throgs Neck, and Verrazzano-Narrows Bridges, as well as the Queens Midtown and Hugh L. Carey Tunnels, and establish a $50 violation fee for the Congestion Relief Zone.

tool_args.label: QMT South Tube Exhaust Duct Breach Incident

payload.claim_text: On September 4th, there was an incident at the Queens Midtown Tunnel (QMT) where the South Tube exhaust duct was breached by a drill rig from a barge on the East River. The permanent repair was completed on September 6th, just two days after the initial incident had occurred.
payload.description: QMT South Tube exhaust duct breach by drill rig from barge; temporary repair and tube reopening same day; permanent repair completed within 2 days

evidence_refs.source_quote: on September 4th, there was an incident at the Queens Midtown Tunnel (QMT) where the South Tube exhaust duct was breached by a drill rig from a barge on the East River.
The permanent repair commenced immediately thereafter and was completed on September 6th, just two days after the initial incident had occurred.

payload.claim_text: TBTA marked a notable milestone for its inter-agency law enforcement partnership in the ongoing crackdown of ghost plates and persistent toll evaders. TBTA's twenty-fifth joint operation was held at the Bronx-Whitestone Bridge, followed by a press conference where President Sheridan was proud to join Chair Lieber and leadership from the NYPD, New York State Police, Department of Motor Vehicles, New York City Sheriff, MTA PD, Taxi and Limousine Commission Police, and Port Authority Police.
payload.description: Inter-agency law enforcement partnership for ghost plate crackdown reached 25th joint operation

evidence_refs.source_quote: TBTA marked a notable milestone for its inter-agency law enforcement partnership in the ongoing crackdown of ghost plates and persistent toll evaders. TBTA's twenty-fifth joint operation was held at the Bronx-Whitestone Bridge

tool_args.label: Peregrine Falcon Preservation at TBTA Bridges

payload.claim_text: TBTA's Maintenance Department has continued for more than four decades to play a key role in the environmental success story of protecting peregrine falcons, an endangered species. These efforts include facilitating the hatching and banding of peregrine falcon chicks in nest boxes constructed and installed atop the Marine Parkway, Throgs Neck and Verrazzano-Narrows bridge towers, in partnership with the New York City Department of Environmental Protection.
payload.description: TBTA peregrine falcon conservation program with nest boxes on three bridge towers

payload.claim_text: Turning to summer traffic and revenue, President Sheridan reported that both are exceeding 2023 levels and are anticipated to continue to do so through the end of the year.
payload.description: Summer 2024 traffic and revenue exceeding 2023 levels, anticipated to continue through end of year
Underspending of $2.1M (8.5%) vs Mid-Year-Forecast YTD mainly due to continued management efficiencies, and improved scheduling and deployment, partially offset by coverage for vacancies

payload.claim_text: Previewing next month's meeting, President Sheridan stated that TBTA's new leadership team and organizational structure will be presented, in accomplishment of TBTA's goal this year to realign leadership and departments to better position TBTA for the future.

payload.claim_text: TBTA's Special Operations Division conducted a tabletop exercise centered around a hypothetical storm and potential impact to one of TBTA's tunnels. Representatives from all TBTA departments, as well as Construction & Development engineering partners, were engaged throughout the prep, response, and recovery phases.
payload.description: Annual hurricane/tropical storm season tabletop exercise by TBTA Special Operations Division
